ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat/ALPHV Rust ransomware execution via mandatory --access-token argument
ucs.description: Hunts the signature CLI invocation of the ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) Rust payload. The encryptor refuses to execute without an operator-supplied --access-token (anti-analysis), and is paired with BlackCat-specific switches (--paths, --child, --no-prop, --no-net, --prop-file, --ui, --verbose). This combination is essentially unique to BlackCat affiliates and is documented in CISA AA23-061A, Sophos, and Microsoft (DEV-0237) reporting.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_hash) as hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process="*--access-token*" AND (Processes.process="*--paths*" OR Processes.process="*--child*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop*" OR Processes.process="*--no-net*" OR Processes.process="*--prop-file*" OR Processes.process="*--ui*" OR Processes.process="*--verbose*") AND NOT (Processes.user="*$" OR Processes.user="SYSTEM" OR Processes.user="LOCAL SERVICE") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=cmdline "--access-token\s+(?<token>[A-Fa-f0-9]{20,})" | where isnotnull(token) | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// BlackCat/ALPHV — Rust encryptor invoked with --access-token + characteristic flags
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "--access-token"        // mandatory ALPHV gate
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (                   // BlackCat-specific switches
      "--paths", "--child", "--no-prop", "--no-net",
      "--prop-file", "--ui", "--verbose", " -v ")
| extend Token = extract(@"(?i)--access-token\s+([A-Fa-f0-9]{20,})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine, Token,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentSHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// BlackCat/ALPHV — Rust encryptor invocation (Windows 4688)
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where CommandLine has "--access-token"
| where CommandLine has_any (
      "--paths", "--child", "--no-prop", "--no-net",
      "--prop-file", "--ui", "--verbose")
| extend Token = extract(@"(?i)--access-token\s+([A-Fa-f0-9]{20,})", 1, CommandLine)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, Token,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: BlackCat ALPHV Ransomware Execution via --access-token Argument
id: 6b1a7f2c-9e4d-4c3a-aa12-blackcat-token-2026
status: experimental
description: Detects ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) Rust ransomware execution by its mandatory --access-token gate paired with BlackCat-specific operator flags (--paths, --child, --no-prop, --no-net, --prop-file, --ui, --verbose).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-061a
  - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2022/07/14/blackcat-ransomware-attacks-not-merely-a-byproduct-of-bad-luck/
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_token:
    CommandLine|contains: '--access-token'
  selection_flags:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--paths'
      - '--child'
      - '--no-prop'
      - '--no-net'
      - '--prop-file'
      - '--ui'
      - '--verbose'
  condition: selection_token and selection_flags
falsepositives:
  - Authorised red-team using the public ALPHV decompiler clone
level: critical
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.003
ucs.rationale: The --access-token argument is hard-coded into the ALPHV Rust binary as an anti-analysis self-gate — without the operator's hex token, the executable exits. No legitimate Windows software uses this exact flag-set together. Pairing the token gate with BlackCat's documented switch vocabulary (--paths, --child, --no-prop, --prop-file) yields essentially zero false positives and fires the moment an af
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat pre-encryption sabotage chain (vssadmin + wmic + bcdedit + wbadmin + wevtutil)
ucs.description: Detects BlackCat/ALPHV's documented pre-encryption sequence: shadow-copy nuke (vssadmin/wmic), boot-recovery disable (bcdedit), backup-catalog wipe (wbadmin), event-log clear (wevtutil), and stop of VSS/SQL/Veeam services — all executed within a short window from one host. CISA AA23-061A and Mandiant report this exact stacked-LOLBin chain immediately precedes payload detonation by ALPHV affiliates.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_name) as bins from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND Processes.process="*shadow*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND (Processes.process="*catalog*" OR Processes.process="*backup*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wevtutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*cl *") OR (Processes.process_name="net.exe" AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*vss*" OR Processes.process="*sql*" OR Processes.process="*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*backup*"))) AND NOT Processes.user="*$" by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=5m | stats dc(bins) as distinct_inhibitors values(bins) as actions values(cmdlines) as cmds min(firstTime) as first max(lastTime) as last by Processes.dest Processes.user | where distinct_inhibitors>=3 | convert ctime(first) ctime(last)
ucs.kql:
// BlackCat/ALPHV — pre-encryption sabotage chain on a single host within a 5-minute window
let Window = 5m;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend Action = case(
    FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadow", "vss_delete",
    FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete", "wmic_shadowcopy_delete",
    FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no", "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "bcd_recovery_off",
    FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("catalog","backup"), "wbadmin_delete",
    FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "cl ", "evtlog_clear",
    FileName =~ "fsutil.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has "usn deletejournal", "usn_delete",
    FileName =~ "net.exe"      and ProcessCommandLine has "stop" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("vss","sql","veeam","backup"), "service_stop",
    "")
| where Action != ""
| summarize DistinctActions = dcount(Action),
            Actions  = make_set(Action),
            Commands = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 32),
            Parents  = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, Window)
| where DistinctActions >= 3   // 3+ distinct inhibitor categories within 5 min = ALPHV staging signature
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// BlackCat/ALPHV — pre-encryption sabotage chain (Windows 4688)
let Window = 5m;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| extend Action = case(
    Bin == "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadow", "vss_delete",
    Bin == "wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete", "wmic_shadowcopy_delete",
    Bin == "bcdedit.exe"  and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no", "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "bcd_recovery_off",
    Bin == "wbadmin.exe"  and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has_any ("catalog","backup"), "wbadmin_delete",
    Bin == "wevtutil.exe" and CommandLine has "cl ", "evtlog_clear",
    Bin == "fsutil.exe"   and CommandLine has "usn deletejournal", "usn_delete",
    Bin == "net.exe"      and CommandLine has "stop" and CommandLine has_any ("vss","sql","veeam","backup"), "service_stop",
    "")
| where Action != ""
| summarize DistinctActions = dcount(Action),
            Actions  = make_set(Action),
            Commands = make_set(CommandLine, 32),
            Parents  = make_set(ParentProcessName),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, Window)
| where DistinctActions >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Individually, each of these LOLBins fires occasionally during legitimate admin work (backup software, tape rotation, SCCM patching). What is BlackCat-distinctive is the stacked execution: 3+ inhibitor categories from one user on one host inside 5 minutes. CISA AA23-061A explicitly documents this exact recipe for ALPHV (BlackCat) affiliates, and it is the same chain encoded directly into BlackCat's
